raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-H-001] interface.f90:5 <-> header.h:2  param[0] 'flag'
  LOGICAL_ENCODING: Fortran default LOGICAL (not LOGICAL(c_bool)) has
  compiler-defined encoding. GFortran: .TRUE.=-1 (0xFFFFFFFF).
  ifort: .TRUE.=1. C 'int': 1=true. GFortran value fails '== 1' test.
  Use LOGICAL(c_bool) (Fortran) and _Bool (C) for guaranteed encoding.

NOTE: LOGICAL(c_bool) guarantees .TRUE.=1, .FALSE.=0, matching C99 _Bool.
